breaking.title: Israel and Iran trade strikes, threatening to drag region back to war
breaking.summary: Israeli authorities said two waves of Iranian missiles targeted the country and urged the public to seek shelter. Explosions could be heard in central Israel as Israeli air defences sought to intercept the incoming Iranian fire

breaking.title: Watch: Missiles rain across Israel's night sky as Iran launches fresh attacks after two months
breaking.summary: Iran launched missiles at Israel, triggering air raid sirens and forcing millions to shelters. Israel claims to have intercepted the projectiles, but explosions were heard. Tehran warned of broader retaliation after an earlier Israeli strike. Meanwhile, former US President Trump urged restraint, reportedly persuading Prime Minister Netanyahu to hold off on immediate response.

breaking.title: 7.8 magnitude earthquake in southern Philippines causes 4 deaths, damage and tsunami
breaking.summary: Philippine authorities urged people in affected coastal regions to move to higher ground after the offshore quake hit south of General Santos, a city of about 7,20,000

breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: Yemeni Houthis ban ⁠Israeli ​maritime ‌navigation in Red Sea, say attacked Israel
breaking.summary: Iran says it struck Israel’s Nevatim and Tel Nof air bases, as the two sides traded fire in the largest flare-up in fighting since a ceasefire took effect in April

breaking.title: Arab attacker opens fire in central Israel, killing 1 and wounding 5
breaking.summary: The attack came at a time of heightened tensions following a spate of Israeli settler attacks and the deadly shooting of a Palestinian baby over the weekend in the nearby West Bank

breaking.title: The Papers:  'Iran fires missile barrage' and 'New Eriksen hell'
breaking.summary: Iran's latest strike on Israel and Danish footballer Christian Eriksen's on-field collapse are prominent on Monday's papers.

breaking.title: Trinamool Congress leader and Falta candidate Jahangir Khan arrested
breaking.summary: Jahangir Khan had withdrawn from the contest at Falta re-poll on May 21 and has been on the run since the polling was held

breaking.title: Tech stocks plunge in Asia after record rally and renewed Middle East attacks
breaking.summary: Markets in South Korea and Japan slid after a rally in tech stocks in recent weeks.
